creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
Exploring the Mediterranean with @celebritycruises ✨

During the cruise you can visit bucket-list destinations such as Santorini 🇬🇷 and Capri 🇮🇹, stay in a spacious Infinite Veranda stateroom with unbeatable sea views 🌅, and enjoy fantastic stage productions and onboard activities ✨

One of the highlights is, of course, the food, with unique dining experiences such as Le Petit Chef 👨‍🍳 and a wide range of international cuisine available every day 🥂

There are also plenty of places to recharge ☀️, including the multi-level Eden venue 🌿 and the Sunset Bar , plus swimming pools for sea days, all paired with exceptional service and attention to detail ✨

We sailed onboard the award-winning Edge Series ship, Celebrity Ascent🛳️, featuring a Rooftop Garden , the Magic Carpet 💫, and a modern design with something for everyone 

It was very special to share this experience with my mum and explore new places together ✨🤍

*ad press trip

#travel #europe #cruise #CelebrityCruises #celebrityascent

transcription.text: Go somewhere in the crowd there.
